risks.title: Security component modified without apparent review
risks.evidence: Security.tsx has been changed (4 events in 17 seconds, highest relevance 0.95)
risks.recommendedAction: Immediately review Security.tsx changes and run security-focused tests before merge

risks.title: Event system producing duplicates
risks.evidence: 4 events for identical code change within 17 seconds; 2 explicitly marked 'duplicate-event'
risks.recommendedAction: Investigate code-observer deduplication logic; implement timestamp-based windowing to prevent near-identical events

opportunities.title: Implement automated security file review workflow
opportunities.evidence: Security.tsx changes detected but require manual review; automation could catch issues earlier
opportunities.suggestedAction: Create automated linting/scanning rule for Security.tsx commits before merge

opportunities.title: Improve event system reliability
opportunities.evidence: Duplicate detection already attempted but incomplete; multiple events with near-identical timestamps
opportunities.suggestedAction: Refactor event deduplication to use composite key (file_path + timestamp_window) rather than timestamp-only matching

taskCandidates.title: Review and validate Security.tsx changes
taskCandidates.description: Examine the modifications to src/screens/Security.tsx, verify no auth/credential handling issues were introduced, and run security tests
taskCandidates.rationale: Security file modified with high relevance (0.95); requires immediate human review

taskCandidates.title: Debug event deduplication in code-observer
taskCandidates.description: Investigate why 4 nearly-identical events were generated for one file change; fix the deduplication logic
taskCandidates.rationale: Current deduplication is incomplete, creating noise in event stream

recommendations.title: Prioritize security file change review
recommendations.rationale: Security.tsx is a sensitive component; changes require manual review before deployment
recommendations.action: Block deployment until Security.tsx changes pass security review and automated tests

recommendations.title: Fix event duplication at source
recommendations.rationale: Duplicate events reduce signal-to-noise ratio and complicate monitoring
recommendations.action: Update code-observer's deduplication window to 2-3 seconds and use file_path + content_hash as composite key

pendingApprovals.reason: Sensitive proactive task requires approval: Review and validate Security.tsx changes
